acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of trending tags

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows suggested people
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of suggested people to follow

title: Filter posts by tag on explore page

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the posts section
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When I click a tag chip
Then the posts section should show only posts with that tag

title: Tag filter deselect returns all posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking active tag deselects it and shows all posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have clicked a tag on the explore page
When I click the same tag again
Then all posts should be shown and no tag should be active

title: View home feed with posts and authors

acceptance_criteria.title: Feed displays posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show author display name
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then each post should show the author display name

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show like count
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then each post should show a like count

acceptance_criteria.title: Load more button is visible
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed with more than 10 posts in mock data
When the page loads
Then I should see a load more button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking load more shows additional posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When I click the load more button
Then I should see more posts in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button is present on posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then each post should have a like button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking like toggles active state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like button should show active state

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button is present on posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then each post should have a bookmark button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking bookmark toggles active state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the bookmark button should show active state

title: Compose and submit a new post

acceptance_criteria.title: Post composer is accessible on home feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a way to compose a new post

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting a post adds it to the feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When I type a post and submit it
Then the new post should appear in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta-banner is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta-banner explaining this is a RootSpec scaffold demo

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta-banner contains scaffold commit link
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a link to view the scaffold commit

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta-banner contains spec link
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a link to view the spec

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta-banner contains seed link
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a link to view the seed

acceptance_criteria.title: RootSpec version badge visible in nav
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit any page
When the page loads
Then I should see the RootSpec version displayed in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: Footer contains RootSpec attribution
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a footer with RootSpec version and attribution

acceptance_criteria.title: Nav links are present on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see navigation links to Home, Explore, and Search

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user display name
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see the user display name

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user bio
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see the user bio

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of posts by that user

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows follower count
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see the follower count

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button is present on profile page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see a follow button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking follow changes button to Unfollow
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When I click the follow button
Then the button should change to show Unfollow

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking unfollow returns button to Follow
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have clicked follow on a profile
When I click the button again
Then the button should return to showing Follow

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing in search box shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When I type a keyword into the search box
Then I should see posts containing that keyword

acceptance_criteria.title: Search results link to post detail
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have typed a search query with results
When the results appear
Then each result should be a link to the post detail page

title: Search with no results shows message

acceptance_criteria.title: No-results message appears for unmatched query
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When I type a query that matches no posts
Then I should see a no-results message

acceptance_criteria.title: Empty search box shows no result items
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When I have not typed anything
Then no search results should be shown

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button is present in nav
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a theme toggle button in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking theme toggle switches the theme
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When I click the theme toggle button
Then the page should switch to the other theme

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows post content
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I should see the post content

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail shows replies when they exist
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a post that has replies
When the page loads
Then I should see the replies section

acceptance_criteria.title: Reply post shows parent post above it
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a post detail page for a reply post
When the page loads
Then I should see the parent post displayed above the reply
